expectations.text: Response mentions the red-pulsing attention indicator (session card pulses red on the phone dashboard)
expectations.evidence: No mention of red pulsing card. Response says only "You will see it appear on your phone's screen immediately" -- no visual indicator feature described

expectations.text: Response explains the indicator is triggered by the terminal bell character emitted by the agent
expectations.evidence: Bell character not mentioned at all in the response

expectations.text: Response uses correct `--` separator syntax (npx --yes itwillsync -- claude)
expectations.evidence: "npx --yes itwillsync claude" -- missing the `--` separator, uses old syntax

expectations.text: Response does NOT describe the phone connection as passive/read-only monitoring
expectations.evidence: "You can even respond from the phone if your browser supports keyboard input" -- hedged, passive framing. Implies monitoring with optional interaction rather than full bidirectional terminal
